name: TSRC Corporation
summary: TSRC Corporation manufactures and markets synthetic rubber and elastomers, and applied materials in Taiwan and internationally. Its products include ESBR rubber for use in automotive tires, shoe soles, conveyor belts, military caterpillar and tow trucks tracks, sports equipment, and toys; SSBR rubber for use in energy-saving, high performance, and all-season tires; BR rubber that is used in the production of plastic modification for HIPS and high-speed radial tires; and NBR rubber for use in oil hoses, oil seals, rollers, industrial gaskets, belts, shoe soles, rubber plastic foam sheets, and conveyor belts. The company also provides styrene-butadiene-styrene, styrene-isoprene-styrene, and styrene-ethylene/butylene-styrene copolymers, as well as T-BLEND applied materials for use in plastic modification, compounding, adhesive, packaging, medical, elastic film, shoe material, foaming material, labels, hygiene, wire and cable, flexography, gasket material, and soft touch material applications. The company was formerly known as Taiwan Synthetic Rubber Corporation and changed its name to TSRC Corporation in August 1999. TSRC Corporation was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
